ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the move */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the move */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move (damage dealt) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move (percentage chance to hit) */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Number of Power Points (PP) the move has */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target of the move */,
  "info" TEXT /* Additional information or effects of the move */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  "crit_rate" INTEGER /* Critical hit rate of the move */,
  "drain_rate" INTEGER /* Percentage of damage that is drained back to the user */,
  "recoil_rate" INTEGER /* Percentage of damage that is dealt back to the user */,
  "volatile_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a volatile status effect */,
  "stat_changes" TEXT /* JSON string describing the stat changes */,
  "weather_effect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a weather effect */,
  "terrain_effect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a terrain effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES move_targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES move_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the move type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move type */,
  "super_effective_against" TEXT /* JSON string describing types that this type is super effective against */,
  "not_very_effective_against" TEXT /* JSON string describing types that this type is not very effective against */,
  "ineffective_against" TEXT /* JSON string describing types that this type is ineffective against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the move category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the move target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the Pokémon */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the Pokémon */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who owns the Pokémon */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the Pokémon */,
  "current_hp" INTEGER /* Current HP of the Pokémon */,
  "max_hp" INTEGER /* Maximum HP of the Pokémon */,
  "atk" INTEGER /* Attack stat */,
  "def" INTEGER /* Defense stat */,
  "spa" INTEGER /* Special Attack stat */,
  "spd" INTEGER /* Special Defense stat */,
  "spe" INTEGER /* Speed stat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "learn_method" TEXT /* Method by which the Pokémon learned the move (e.g., Level Up, TM, Breeding) */,
  "learn_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon learned the move (if applicable) */,
  "pp_current" INTEGER /* Current PP of the move */,
  "pp_max" INTEGER /* Maximum PP of the move */,
  "last_used_battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last battle where the move was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id", "move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trainer (e.g., Trainer, Researcher, Admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the trainer registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "battle_wins" INTEGER /* Number of battles won */,
  "battle_losses" INTEGER /* Number of battles lost */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)
